title: gonolobus riparius
intro: Gonolobus riparius, also known as the Mexican prickly poppy or the Mexican climbing milkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the milkweed family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gonolobus riparius include its ability to treat various conditions such as wounds, fever, and skin infections, as well as its use as an antivenom for certain snake bites. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
